creator: jmd@freebsd.org
text: Yes, we install all firmware unconditionally, this is intended to make the port more user-friendly. Note that even if one were to split by kernel module (radeon vs amdgpu vs i915), one would still install firmware not needed for the specific GPU model (e.g., AMD Polaris vs Vega or Intel Sandy vs Kaby). If space is a concern, I'd advise only installing the actual firmwares needed for ones GPU.
